## Memory Context

### reference_local_models.md
LM Studio is the user's preferred local model runtime at http://localhost:1234/v1.
Ollama is an alternative at http://localhost:11434/v1.
Recommended models: Qwen 3 14B (primary), Phi-4 Mini Reasoning (secondary).

### feedback_no_commit.md
HARD RULE: Never run any git operation (commit, push, stage, reset, checkout). The user owns all git operations. Brain notifies when a commit is due but never executes it.

### project_proj123.md
PROJ-123: Service onboarding revamp — 7-step wizard plan. Baseline is clean (tsc + ESLint 0 errors). Ready to implement.
